currentPhase: F6 premium UI overhaul (Gallery Press) — in progress
nextRecommendedTask: Continue F6. Immediate: TMS-UX3 (propagate Gallery Press across storefront routes — artworks index/detail, shop, product detail, collections, drops, stories, community, search, info pages), then finish TMS-UX1-004 (migrate remaining cards → Frame objects), TMS-UX1-005 (form primitives), TMS-UX1-006 (Select portal + Combobox + dropdown audit), TMS-UX2-007 (axe + production Lighthouse on new home), then UX4 (Design Studio), UX5 (commerce/account), UX6 (admin), UX7 (hardening + Playwright before/after PNGs). Screenshot capture via storefront Playwright (in-app Browser pane capture times out in this env).
knownDefects: TMS-F1-DEF-001 (soft 404) — FIXED for production hosting: /artworks|/collections|/products/[slug] now generateStaticParams + dynamicParams=false (fallback:false → genuine 404 on static/CDN/edge). Root cause corrected: NOT Turbopack-specific (webpack build identical) — general Next 16 next-start behavior. Residual: self-hosted next start still returns 200 for unknown slugs (styled not-found renders); no NextResponse.rewrite variant overrides rendered status. Add a middleware/proxy slug-guard if self-hosting.
visualRegressionStatus: baselines-committed (4 viewports, homepage; Windows-rendered, not in CI)

storefront:cart/promotion/totals — client localStorage store, mock promos (TMS-FBR-003)
storefront:checkout delivery/quote/order — mock delivery + VAT, local order snapshot (TMS-FBR-004)
storefront:payment states — mock resolver, no real Flutterwave; needs webhook-verified status (TMS-FBR-004)
storefront:auth/session/account — mock localStorage session, no real auth or passwords (TMS-FBR-005)
storefront:account orders history / order tracking — client localStorage, keyed by contact email; needs orders API + real fulfilment status (TMS-FBR-004)
storefront:account saved designs + wishlist — client localStorage per email; needs account-data API (TMS-FBR-005)
admin:staff auth/session — mock localStorage staff session, no real auth/RBAC/passwords (TMS-FBR-006)
admin:dashboard metrics/queues/recent orders/top lists — typed mock admin provider, no admin read API (TMS-FBR-007)
admin:orders list/detail + fulfilment actions + internal notes — typed mock provider + local notes, no admin order API (TMS-FBR-007)
admin:artwork list/detail/versions/mockups + publishing lifecycle + upload — typed mock provider + local state, no admin catalogue write API (TMS-FBR-007)

admin:garment list/detail + colours/sizes/size charts/media/print rules/prices + inventory (stock edits, colour availability, lifecycle) — typed mock provider + local state, no admin catalogue read/write API (TMS-FBR-007)

admin:production board (jobs derived from orders) + stage transitions (queue/print/QC pass/reprint/dispatch/exception) — typed mock provider + local state, no admin fulfilment API or audited state machine (TMS-FBR-007)

admin:error centre (safe integration failures — correlation id + resolution lifecycle, no stack traces/secrets) + customers (derived from orders) + analytics (daily series/status mix/top lists derived from orders) — typed mock provider + local state, no admin ops/customer/analytics API (TMS-FBR-007)

admin:brand storyteller (/storyteller) — deterministic mock copy generator (lib/storyteller.ts), no LLM; drafts in local state only and always 'draft' (never publishes); real generation endpoint + draft persistence are backend (TMS-FBR-009)

storefront:/drops list + detail (limited drops, live countdowns, status, early-access panel) — typed mock provider (listDrops/getDrop) with now-relative timestamps; early-access gate + waitlist are UI-only (no real membership/notify); needs the drops API + server-authoritative timeline/inventory (TMS-FBR-008)

storefront:waitlist / back-in-stock (sold-out products + sold-out/upcoming drops) — client localStorage store (tms.waitlist.v1), no real notification sent; needs the waitlist/notify endpoint (TMS-FBR-008)

storefront:made-to-order / pre-order lead-time (product + cart + checkout + drops) — client-side working-day estimate (lib/fulfilment.ts), no real reservation; real ship timeline is server-authoritative + pre-order hold is backend (TMS-FBR-004/008)

storefront:artwork passport (/artworks/[slug]/passport) — frontend-derived immutable version id + illustrative serial (lib/passport.ts, deterministic FNV-1a), ownership-record placeholder, no real authenticity proof; server-authoritative version id + per-piece serial/ownership ledger are backend (TMS-FBR-001)

storefront:shoppable stories (/stories + /stories/[slug]) — mock/editorial story seeds with hotspots over placeholder scene imagery; hotspot targets built from existing artwork/product/collection data (no new backend); a real CMS feed maps onto the Story* shapes + real scene photography/authored coordinates replace placeholders

storefront:reviews & ratings (product + artwork detail) — read-only seeded reviews + aggregate stars (lib/reviews.ts); write-a-review is preview-only (local state, no network); real read/write, verified-purchase vouch, and moderation are backend (TMS-FBR-008)

storefront:community gallery (/community + artwork 'styled by the community') — approved-only seeded photos (placeholder tiles, no real upload); submit-a-photo is preview-only (local 'in review', nothing sent); real UGC intake/storage + moderation are backend (TMS-FBR-008)

storefront:studio guide (/studio-guide) — deterministic mock assistant (lib/studio-guide.ts), no LLM/live tools; guardrails deflect stock/price/delivery; order-status = tool_error + retry; real assistant endpoint + tool results are backend (TMS-FBR-009)

storefront:loyalty & referrals (/account/loyalty) — illustrative email-derived points/tier + rewards + referral code (lib/loyalty.ts); redeem/share are preview-only; real ledger/earn/redeem + referral attribution are backend (TMS-FBR-008)
f6Note: Premium UI overhaul 'The Gallery Press'. Branch off newest F5 frontend state, merged origin/main (backend auth B1-001/002, clean). Design system reconstructed in packages/ui: neutral gallery paper + near-black ink primary + teal signature; added IBM Plex Mono; elevation + motion + image ratio tokens; new primitives Reveal/Frame/SectionIndex/Rule/Marquee. 28/28 AA contrast pairs pass. Landing page fully recomposed (art-led hero, marquee, numbered sections, dark studio band, reveal motion). Header/footer widened to editorial 90rem + refined. Verified live: body #f4f3f0 / ink #131417 / accent #16171a / mono loaded / h1 89.6px desktop 44px mobile / no horizontal overflow at 375 & 1280 / 8 affected routes all HTTP 200 no error overlay. UI package rebuilt (dist). storefront typecheck clean. Screenshot capture deferred to Playwright (Browser-pane capture times out in this env).
buildStatusNote: F5 (growth & AI) COMPLETE — all of TMS-F5-001…010 Verified (pnpm check green). Storefront: 001 drops, 002 waitlist, 003 pre-order/made-to-order, 004 reviews, 005 community gallery, 006 artwork passport, 007 shoppable stories, 008 studio guide, 010 loyalty & referrals. Admin: 009 brand storyteller. F0–F4 Verified AND MERGED TO MAIN (2026-07-15). The F0→F4 PR stack (#4→#8) was merged bottom-up with merge commits (main HEAD e919e7e; merge commits 9599d35/190d8c7/d0201a1/f0de066/e919e7e) and all five phase branches deleted; pnpm check re-run green on the integrated main (13/13 build tasks, all unit tests, format/lint/typecheck/db:validate). Recovery note: PR #5 auto-closed when gh's --delete-branch removed its base (f0) before the auto-retarget fired; recovered by recreating the f0 branch, reopening #5, retargeting to main — thereafter each next PR was retargeted to main BEFORE merge and branches were deleted only as final cleanup. Only open item is defect TMS-F1-DEF-001 (soft 404, SEO-only). Admin Vitest 125 tests (was 116 — +9 storyteller); storefront 195 (was 89 — +24 drops, +6 waitlist, +10 fulfilment, +11 passport, +11 stories, +13 reviews, +12 community, +8 studio-guide, +11 loyalty). Note: pnpm audit 410 outage since F3-004 (this is the only failing CI 'quality' check — a retired npm endpoint, not a code issue); no new deps added.
